source.name: User-provided Liquid Glass UI Kit screenshots
source.license_notes: User-provided visual reference for personal knowledge base. Store summarized observations, not redistributed original images.

layout_rules: Use large radius values so buttons and inputs feel like rounded glass capsules rather than flat rectangles.
Layer controls above a soft light background or blurred gradient so transparency has something to refract.
Keep generous spacing between glass components because their shadows and glow need breathing room.
Use a small set of accent colors as internal glow, not as flat fills across every component.
Use heavier glass blocks for hero cards and lighter glass pills for secondary controls.
interaction_states: disabled with lower opacity and reduced shadow
accessibility_notes: Do not put low-contrast gray text on transparent glass; text should usually be near-black on light glass or white on dark glass.
Use glass as a surface treatment, not as the only state indicator; pair color with icons or text.
Offer a reduced-transparency fallback for accessibility and low-performance devices.
implementation_hints: CSS baseline: backdrop-filter blur, translucent background, layered box-shadow, inner border, inset highlight, and pseudo-elements for glossy streaks.
Use radial gradients at corners to simulate caustic color glints and edge refraction.
For realistic glass, combine outer drop shadow, inner white highlight, subtle dark inner stroke, and a top-left glossy reflection.
Animate hover by moving highlight and increasing rim brightness, not by scaling aggressively.
Use sparingly for dense enterprise tables; reserve full liquid glass for hero, cards, buttons, search, modal, and navigation shells.

quality.notes: Derived from eight user-provided screenshots showing liquid glass buttons, inputs, modals, cards, switches, tabs, and dark variants.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use this when the user asks for Liquid Glass or glassmorphism like the provided screenshots: thick rounded translucent components, frosted blur, glossy specular highlights, chromatic edge glow, soft refractive shadows, and tactile 3D pill controls.
